iteration_flow.agent_1_slice: Choose exactly one bounded exam-bank output-integrity slice, biased toward PNG/question alignment, mark-scheme alignment, missing/orphan image detection, weak crop detection, duplicate mapping detection, cross-question contamination, dataset ingestion consistency, manifest/schema validation, or focused review-pack generation.
iteration_flow.agent_2_before_agent_3: Agent 2 must create or update tests, validation checks, fixtures, or a review-pack verification plan before Agent 3 edits extraction, rendering, manifest, or alignment code.
iteration_flow.agent_3_boundaries: Agent 3 may edit extraction/alignment code only to satisfy Agent 2's checks and Agent 1's acceptance criteria; broad feature work and report-only churn are out of scope.
iteration_flow.agent_4_sample_audit: Agent 4 must audit sampled output evidence, including actual PNGs or a generated review pack when the iteration affects image mapping, crops, question-to-mark-scheme pairing, or contamination detection. Passing tests alone is insufficient.
